result.summary: magneto365.com exposes a public MCP server for Magneto Empleos job search at `https://api.magneto365.com/agents/v1/mcp`; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found.
result.description: Magneto365 is a hiring and job-search platform used to publish job listings and help candidates find employment opportunities. Its public-facing site centers on vacancies, job content, and recruiting-related resources.
